name: GoReplay
description: Open-source network monitoring tool that captures live HTTP traffic and replays it against test or staging environments for load and regression testing.

seo.title: GoReplay — Test Automation / Device Cloud
seo.meta_description: GoReplay: Open-source network monitoring tool that captures live HTTP traffic and replays it against test or staging environments for load and regression testin

when_to_use: Capture live HTTP traffic and replay to staging
Shadow testing by mirroring production requests
Load testing staging with real production traffic shape
Regression detection by comparing live vs staged responses

pros: Replays real production HTTP traffic, very realistic
Captures at the network layer, minimal app changes
Handy for regression and soak testing staging
Open source with a pragmatic paid tier
cons: Requires careful PII scrubbing on captured traffic
Stateful flows with auth tokens need extra care
Not a fit for synthetic load profiles
review.verdict: A powerful way to test changes with real traffic, provided you respect privacy and session state.
review.best_for: Backend teams validating refactors against realistic production request patterns
review.not_for: Teams needing synthetic, scripted load profiles with precise user counts

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium tier; no explicit peak-lock or reserved-capacity evidence.
